title: Unexpected splitnets -ports behavior after #5095 (name single bit arrays as arrays)

features.name: single_bit_packed_array_port_declaration
features.description: Code should include a single-bit packed array port declaration where array range is [0:0]
features.snippet:
input logic [0:0] a;
output logic [0:0] b;

features.name: splitnets_ports_format_command
features.description: Code should include a splitnets command with -ports flag and -format string for naming convention

features.name: multi_bit_packed_array_port_declaration
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit packed array port declaration for contrast with single-bit case
features.snippet:
input logic [1:0] x;
output logic [1:0] y;
